common.title.message: RISC-V Software Porting and Optimization Championship

common.description.message: The RISC-V Software Porting and Optimization Challenge (RVSPOC) is a global technical competition bringing together developers and enthusiasts to drive the RISC-V open-source ecosystem forward. The first three editions of the competition have successfully brought together active developers from around the world, accelerating the porting and optimization of numerous open-source software projects to the RISC-V architecture. RVSPOC 2026 was initiated by Wu Wei, founder & director of the Jiachen Project, and organized by Kubuds Technology. This year's challenges span AI, Embodied AI, desktop and server software ecosystems, compilers, runtime environments, and AI software stacks—inviting global developers to compete for cash prizes.
